name: Festive Edition Skylanders
description: Festive Edition Skylanders are Skylanders that have a design that represents a specific day of the year, primarily Easter, Halloween, Christmas or Valentine's Day. These include both Alt Deco figures and digital Alter Egos.
biography: Festive Edition Skylanders are Skylanders that have a design that represents a specific day of the year, primarily Easter, Halloween, Christmas or Valentine's Day. These include both Alt Deco figures and digital Alter Egos.
quote: Skylanders that have a design that represents a specific day of the year.

story.content: Festive Edition Skylanders are Skylanders that have a design that represents a specific day of the year, primarily Easter, Halloween, Christmas or Valentine's Day. These include both Alt Deco figures and digital Alter Egos.

trivia: Heartbreaker Buckshot is the only Festive Skylander which never had an official release.
Christmas counterparts are mainly of the Life and Water elements.
Halloween counterparts are exclusively of the Undead element.
Valentine's Day counterparts are mainly of the Magic element.

In Skylanders: Imaginators, some of the color schemes for Imaginators are themed around holidays as well: Be My Valentine (Valentine's Day), Lucky Clover (St. Patrick's Day), Egg Hunt (Easter), Trick or Treat (Halloween), and Jingle All the Way (Christmas).
gameplay: Festive Skylanders are special themed versions of standard characters. They function identically to their regular counterparts in terms of gameplay and abilities but feature unique holiday-themed aesthetic designs and in-game models. These variants include both physical Alt Deco figures and digital-only Alter Egos found in spin-off titles.
